title: Blood Magic: Woot Addon
description: Woot Revived Addon that add compatibility with Blood Magic
body:
# Blood Magic: Woot Addon

An addon for [Woot Revived](https://modrinth.com/mod/woot-revived) that add compatibility with [Blood Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/blood-magic).

It add a blood collector upgrade that once bound to a Blood Altar, will act like the Well of Suffering Ritual and consume by default 10 life essence per mob generation in the factory, then produce the mob amount of life essence in the blood altar.

You can use this mod upgrade as a replacement for the Well of Suffering Ritual to avoid spawning entity to generate life essence.

The life essence consumption by the upgrade is editable in the addon config.
